title: Hamilton: History Has Its Eyes on You
original_title: Hamilton: History Has Its Eyes On You
overview: An intimate discussion about the groundbreaking musical that has become a global phenomenon featuring Hamilton's creator, its director, and cast members of the original Broadway production.  A Harvard Historian also shares insight on the historical relevance and accuracy of the production.
